name: Corn Bread or Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease or spray with food release an eight inch square pan or 12 muffin cups.
3. Empty mix into a mixing bowl.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the liquid ingredients until well mixed.
5. Stir the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients until just moistened. Do not overmix.
6. Spoon the batter into the prepared pan or muffin cups. A #12 food dipper (ice cream scoop) works nicely for muffins, cupcakes, etc.
7. Bake muffins for 20 minutes, bread for 25 to 30 minutes.
